annotation.note: Naparovano na Ogar Summer Ale; spravne pivo (Kynspersky pivovar) zadna query nevratila. Vyreseno overridem v overrides.json.

Correct candidate is present, but Untappd lists the brewery as 'Brauerei Gebr. Maisel' while the source brand is 'Maisel & Friends', so brewery_matches fails. The matcher no longer accepts a brewery-less name match, so this is resolved via overrides.json.

annotation.note: Záhora's Silk Road is not on Untappd. Every brewery-qualified query returned nothing; only the bare 'Silk Road' query returned foreign-brewery beers (BrewDog, Around the Bend), which the old brewery-less branch wrongly accepted. With that branch removed the beer correctly stays unmatched.
